trigger.description: ee context (or ee pack replay) detected that an evidence source referenced by the persisted pack ledger has changed contents since the pack was built. The pack is still rendered honestly, but the agent should treat its evidence as potentially stale.
setup_commands: printf 'J6 changed source freshness marker original source evidence.\n' > j6-changed-source.md
ee remember 'J6 changed source freshness marker original source evidence.' --workspace . --level procedural --kind rule --source file://$PWD/j6-changed-source.md#L1 --json
ee context 'J6 changed source freshness marker' --workspace . --json
printf 'J6 changed source freshness marker changed source evidence.\n' > j6-changed-source.md
ee context 'J6 changed source freshness marker' --workspace . --json
ee diag pack-latest --workspace . --query 'J6 changed source freshness marker' --json
